title: Interpret and use agricultural data
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Interpret and use agricultural data demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify, access and apply agricultural data

pcs.text: Discuss workplace business objectives, goals and farming system with business owner or land manager to determine purpose of information being sought
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss workplace business objectives, goals and farming system with business owner or land manager to determine purpose of information being sought?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss workplace business objectives, goals and farming system with business owner or land manager to determine purpose of information being sought.

pcs.text: Identify existing sources of agricultural data available in the workplace to support workplace business objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify existing sources of agricultural data available in the workplace to support workplace business objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify existing sources of agricultural data available in the workplace to support workplace business objectives.

pcs.text: Review and select appropriate software programs or applications (app) to meet workplace business objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and select appropriate software programs or applications (app) to meet workplace business objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and select appropriate software programs or applications (app) to meet workplace business objectives.

pcs.text: Access existing agricultural data and enter into software program or app
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access existing agricultural data and enter into software program or app?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access existing agricultural data and enter into software program or app.

pcs.text: Create maps and summary reports using existing data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Create maps and summary reports using existing data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Create maps and summary reports using existing data.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify, access and apply agricultural data

elements.title: Interpret and explain agricultural data

pcs.text: Interpret maps or reports to identify opportunities and limitations for operational improvements that support business objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret maps or reports to identify opportunities and limitations for operational improvements that support business objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret maps or reports to identify opportunities and limitations for operational improvements that support business objectives.

pcs.text: Conduct field work to ground truth data and record interpretations of data for future use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct field work to ground truth data and record interpretations of data for future use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct field work to ground truth data and record interpretations of data for future use.

pcs.text: Document data results using appropriate interpretation and presentation techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document data results using appropriate interpretation and presentation techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document data results using appropriate interpretation and presentation techniques.

pcs.text: Discuss and explain data results and information with business owner or land manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and explain data results and information with business owner or land manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and explain data results and information with business owner or land manager.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Interpret and explain agricultural data

elements.title: Analyse agricultural data

pcs.text: Collect and analyse data to determine significance of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and analyse data to determine significance of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and analyse data to determine significance of results.

pcs.text: Undertake simple statistical analysis to detect data outliers, imbalances in generated data sets and identify erroneous data points, including determining spatial density of the managed data set
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake simple statistical analysis to detect data outliers, imbalances in generated data sets and identify erroneous data points, including determining spatial density of the managed data set?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake simple statistical analysis to detect data outliers, imbalances in generated data sets and identify erroneous data points, including determining spatial density of the managed data set.

pcs.text: Produce variability maps from suitable data sets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce variability maps from suitable data sets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce variability maps from suitable data sets.

pcs.text: Discuss and recommend solutions utilising agricultural data, and present to business owner or land manager for approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and recommend solutions utilising agricultural data, and present to business owner or land manager for approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and recommend solutions utilising agricultural data, and present to business owner or land manager for approval.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify validity and reliability, and gaps in existing agricultural data.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost hardware and software solutions to address data gaps where required.

pcs.text: Discuss and recommend solutions and seek approval from business owner or land manager

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and recommend solutions and seek approval from business owner or land manager.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine if corrective action is required and take appropriate action.

pcs.text: Review production data to identify changes in productivity as a result of using agricultural data, and document results

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review production data to identify changes in productivity as a result of using agricultural data, and document results.
